title: EdelweissMeshfree: A light-weight, platform-independent, parallel meshfree module for EdelweissFE
description: EdelweissMeshfree provides a light-weight, platform-independent, parallel meshfree module for EdelweissFE. It implements reproducing kernel particle methods (RKPM) and material point methods (MPM) with integration of Marmot elements, cells, material points, and particles.

creators.name: Dummer, Alexander
creators.affiliation: University of Innsbruck;University of Colorado Boulder
